{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040051E7623E6D1C70DD74CFB2"}"},"total":1326},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7278535878689948428","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，喜欢看无敌爽文的可以看，不拖泥带水！确实是怎么牛逼怎么来，爽文就应该像这样，一个眼神，一招就秒杀敌人"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694667450,"group_id":"7251512675409071116","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx0HXS2P/oWyUtHbNveIrcBmNPsmbfpkzAWdTxjlwSse","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"3649973479549239","user_name":"南云南的天气预报"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3649973479549239","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1694265183,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7251512675409071116","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局无敌+收徒+打造势力】
秦牧穿越玄幻世界，开局落入破败生命禁区上苍禁区，原本以为要在禁区里苟上一生。
系统却突然激活，上来奖励大帝修为和帝境仙兽莽荒神牛！并让他招收弟子，壮大禁区，成为诸天第一势力！
收徒天命之子，奖励大帝护卫两尊。
收徒绝世女帝，奖励九转仙法一部、帝境神材十种。
收徒剑仙转世，奖励仙法轮回剑经……
每收徒一位弟子，秦牧便会得到海量的资源神物。
收徒若干位后，提及上苍禁区，举世之人无不谈之色变！
”上苍禁区，乃诸天无上之地！“
“听说了吗？上苍禁区看门的都是大帝！”
“这算什么，上苍之主的九大弟子，各个都有能横推天下的恐怖实力！
那位上苍之主秦牧更是恐怖如斯，听说只是为弟子出气，一掌便将同为生命禁区的轮回海抹平了。”
某圣地老祖：我这一生最大的愿望，就是能拜入上苍禁区，哪怕只是做个扫地的仆役小厮都行！
某上界神女：佛前叩首三千年，只求上苍之主能看我一眼！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5a219facae3f058e9070baec2a4b7fab","author":"嘉禾兔兔","author_id":"","book_id":"7251512675409071116","book_name":"大帝算什么？我连坐骑都是仙兽","book_short_name":"师尊太无敌","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7251512747458822690","read_count":"20015","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1305645"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"625","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e8148839674ee59ad18412e70da73d38~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393651&x-signature=onAPZna53joCVAOc70L3dD5vCOE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"506199233014871","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.4961497e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040051E7623E6D1C70DD74CFB2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_
